info.name: LMS — FAQ API
info.description:
## FAQ Public Endpoints

Base URL: `{{base_url}}`

### Language Switching
Every endpoint supports two methods to switch language:

| Method | How |
|---|---|
| Query param | `?lang=ar` or `?lang=en` |
| Header | `Accept-Language: ar` or `Accept-Language: en` |

> **Default language is Arabic (`ar`)** if neither is provided.

The `question` and `answer` fields in the response reflect the chosen language automatically. The raw `question_ar`, `question_en`, `answer_ar`, `answer_en` fields are always returned regardless of language.

### No Authentication Required
All FAQ endpoints are fully public.

item.name: 🇸🇦 Arabic (Default)
item.description: FAQ requests with Arabic locale. Either omit lang entirely or set lang=ar.

header.description: Returns Arabic question/answer in the 'question' and 'answer' fields

request.description:
Returns all active FAQs in **Arabic**.

The `question` and `answer` fields return Arabic text.

**Two equivalent ways to request Arabic:**
```
Accept-Language: ar
```
or
```
GET /faqs?lang=ar
```

response.name: 200 — All FAQs (Arabic)

request.description:
Filter FAQs by category in Arabic.

**Category values:**
| Value | Arabic label |
|---|---|
| `registration` | التسجيل والدفع |
| `courses` | الدورات والدبلومات |
| `certificates` | الشهادات والاعتماد |
| `platform` | منصة الطالب |
| `support` | الدعم التقني |

item.name: 🇬🇧 English
item.description: FAQ requests with English locale. Use Accept-Language: en header OR ?lang=en query param.

header.description: Returns English question/answer in the 'question' and 'answer' fields

request.description:
Returns all active FAQs in **English** using the `Accept-Language` header.

The `question` and `answer` fields return English text (falls back to Arabic if English is not set).

response.name: 200 — All FAQs (English)

request.description:
Returns all active FAQs in **English** using the `?lang=en` query parameter.

This is the easiest approach for REST clients and mobile apps.
Filter FAQs by category in English.

item.name: 🔀 Dynamic (use {{lang}} variable)
item.description:
Use the collection variable `lang` to switch language without changing individual requests.

Set `lang = ar` or `lang = en` in the collection/environment variables.

header.description: Change the 'lang' collection variable to switch between ar and en

request.description:
Reusable request that uses the `{{lang}}` collection variable.

**To switch language:**
1. Click the collection → Variables tab
2. Change `lang` from `ar` to `en` (or vice versa)
3. All requests in this folder update automatically

Alternatively, create two **Environments**: one with `lang=ar` and one with `lang=en`.

query.description: Optional — same as Accept-Language header. Can use either or both.

request.description: Filter by category using the `{{lang}}` variable.
